de.headline: {team_a_flag} {team_a_iso3} vs. {team_b_flag} {team_b_iso3}: Der Kontext-Check
de.subheadline: {host_city}, {local_date}: Wetter, Zeitzonen und Standortfaktoren im transparenten MVP-Vergleich.
de.teaser: Der auffälligste sichtbare Kontextfaktor ist {public_context_factor_de}. Die Modellunsicherheit liegt bei {uncertainty_level}.
de.weather_summary: Erwartet werden {forecast_temp} Grad Celsius, {forecast_humidity}% Luftfeuchtigkeit und ein Weather Load Score von {weather_load_score}/100.
de.prediction_summary: Die MVP-Prognose lautet {predicted_result_category} mit {probability_team_a_win}% / {probability_draw}% / {probability_team_b_win}% für Team A, Remis und Team B.
de.body: {team_a_name_de} gegen {team_b_name_de}: Das Context Lab kombiniert Basis-Teamstärke, Wetter, Zeitzonen, Höhe und Standortnähe. Die Werte sollen den Spielkontext erklären, nicht den Ausgang beweisen.

en.headline: {team_a_flag} {team_a_iso3} vs {team_b_flag} {team_b_iso3}: The Context Check
en.subheadline: {host_city}, {local_date}: weather, time zones and venue factors in a transparent MVP comparison.
en.teaser: The most visible context factor is {public_context_factor_en}. Model uncertainty is {uncertainty_level}.
en.weather_summary: Expected conditions are {forecast_temp} degrees Celsius, {forecast_humidity}% humidity and a Weather Load Score of {weather_load_score}/100.
en.prediction_summary: The MVP prediction is {predicted_result_category} with {probability_team_a_win}% / {probability_draw}% / {probability_team_b_win}% for Team A, draw and Team B.
en.body: {team_a_name_en} vs {team_b_name_en}: Context Lab combines basic team strength, weather, time zones, altitude and proximity. The values explain match context, not causality.

de.headline: {team_a_iso3} {result_team_a}:{result_team_b} {team_b_iso3}: Prognose vs. Realität
de.body: Das Modell erwartete {predicted_result_category}. Der Vergleich zeigt {prediction_correct_text_de}. Wetter-Check: {weather_check_de}

en.headline: {team_a_iso3} {result_team_a}:{result_team_b} {team_b_iso3}: Prediction vs Reality
en.body: The model expected {predicted_result_category}. The comparison shows {prediction_correct_text_en}. Weather check: {weather_check_en}
